title: Quin
description: A vanilla++ mod with zero world gen, zero fuss
body:
# Quin; Zero world gen, Zero fuss

Quin is a vanilla++ mod full of random neat ideas, features, and more.
Quin's design philosophy is "Zero World Gen, Zero Fuss", meaning you can add it to an existing world without any need to re-generate it.

# Content

Currently Quin has a few content additions:

A new wood set, "Driftwood", found in sunken ship chests, or (untested) fished as a part of fishing loot.

Tree Taps, Resin, Sap, and Syrup. Resin can be used to craft leads, fuel furnaces equal to half of one coal, Sap can be boiled in a smoker for Syrup, which can be eaten or turned into sugar.

Crystal Glass, ultra-transparent stained/tinted glass set, for use in a variety of builds.

Blast Glass, a heavy-duty glass resistant to explosions, comes with a crystal variant too!


More to come!
